title: Deepslate To Stone
description: Deepslate to Stone is a minimalist 16x pack that removes the jarring Deepslate texture from caves, replacing it entirely with the classic Stone texture for a clean, visually cohesive caving experience. A simple fix for cluttered caverns!
body:
Deepslate to Stone: The Visual Cave Fix
Tired of the dark, noisy visual clutter that Deepslate brings to the deep caverns? This simple but effective 16x resource pack is designed for players who prefer the clean, cohesive look of classic Minecraft caving.

This pack completely replaces the default Deepslate block textures—including the sides, top, and bottom—with the standard Stone texture. Below the surface, the transition between Stone and Deepslate will now be visually seamless, making your deep caves feel less jarring and more unified.

Key Features
Core Change: Completely replaces the texture of the Deepslate block with the texture of regular Stone.

Resolution: 16x (Vanilla Standard). This means the pack blends perfectly with the default Minecraft look.

Minimalist Design: Only the base Deepslate block texture is changed. All Deepslate variants (Cobbled Deepslate, Deepslate Bricks, Polished Deepslate, etc.) and all Deepslate Ores remain their default, original textures. This allows you to still use the new building blocks without a visual conflict.

Performance: A tiny file size ensures zero impact on game performance.
